title: UTILITY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: CITY OF GRESHAM UTILITY FINANCIAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides limited emergency funds to assist City of Gresham customers with paying water, sewer, and stormwater bills only. Assistance is limited to once every six billing cycles, and the program will close once funds are exhausted. 1333 NW Eastman Parkway Gresham, OR 97030 Eligibility: Customers of City of Gresham Utilities who live in free standing homes, duplexes, or triplexes. Priority is given towards those making 50% of Area Median Income (AMI). Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 618-2373 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Utility Customer Service (503) 618-2373 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information. For those without Internet access, walk up for a paper application at the payment utility drop box near the front door of Gresham City Hall. After completing the application, please submit to the utility payment drop box at Gresham City Hall. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Gresham utility bill or solid waste and recycling account number, proof of income AREA SERVED: City of Gresham Services: Sewer Service Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF GRESHAM COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - HOMELESS CAMP REPORTING COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - LIVABILITY TEAM COMMUNITY PLANNING AND PUBLIC WORKS - RENTAL HOUSING INSPECTION PROGRAM CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - LAW ENFORCEMENT COMPLAINTS LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCIES - CITY OF GRESHAM POLICE DEPARTMENT LEGAL ASSISTANCE MODALITIES - EAST COUNTY RESOLUTIONS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CITY OF GRESHAM
